description: Evidence about the structure of the Alfven continuum near its quartic minimum (Friman-Rotenberg, Hameiri-Lust-Hameiri operators) and the discrete spectrum accumulating there.

open_questions.question: The field appears to agree about Continuum spectrum near the Alfven minimum. What experiment or derivation would actually change this consensus?

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to the current consensus, would force a rewrite within the group.
suggested_next_steps.title: Counter-experiment proposal

title: Continuum spectrum near the Alfven minimum
